response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java expertise for the role, has no demonstrable experience in insurance or agile consulting projects, and only has basic German language skills — a critical requirement for client collaboration in Germany.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: Minimal to no Java project experience despite role requiring Java proficiency
German language skills are only basic, failing to meet communication requirements
Work history is entirely US-based with no evidence of German client or project exposure
